title: Implement and verify fixes for PR #139 code-quality comments
description: Triages PR comments, applies safe code updates, runs relevant tests/linting, and verifies CI status on GitHub.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Started: creating a dedicated fix branch from develop for PR #139 code-quality remediation.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Applied targeted fixes: replaced 3 empty except/pass blocks with non-fatal logging in CLI evaluation flow; removed redundant json/asyncio imports in Evaluation.py.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Validation: python3 -m py_compile passed for plexus/Evaluation.py and plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations.py. poetry is unavailable in this shell, so ruff/poetry checks could not be run.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: PR #139 code-quality fixes completed and merged to main.
